summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of Astreon Animus Interface - a premium, futuristic system interface portfolio. All major features working correctly including boot sequence, theme switching, system HUD, navigation, and contact form with mocked API.

ui_bugs.issue: Mobile menu button click has overlay interception from System HUD causing timeout on mobile
ui_bugs.impact: Mobile menu button is visible but may require force click due to System HUD overlay interference

design_issues.issue: Console warning: Cannot update a component (SystemHUD) while rendering a different component (Hero)
design_issues.impact: Functional but shows React best practices warning in console

passed_tests: Hero section with ASTREON title and System Initialized status
System boot sequence animation with progress bar
Digital Architecture System subtitle display
System HUD showing real-time FPS, PERF, LOAD, and TIME stats
Theme toggle (bottom left) switches between light/dark modes with smooth transitions
Navigation with numbered sections (01 Identity, 02 Modules, 03 Matrix, 04 Transmission)
Core_Identity section with 'Building the digital future' heading
Stats display (5+, 50+, 30+) with animation
Identity/Expertise/Mission cards with icons and descriptions
System_Modules section with 4 project cards (Neural Analytics, Quantum Commerce, Synth Assistant, CodeFlow IDE)
Project cards showing status indicators (deployed/active) with tech stack tags
Capabilities_Matrix section with skill categories (FE, BE, AI, SYS)
Skill progress bars with percentage display and smooth animations
Transmission_Interface section with contact form
Contact form with Identifier, Signal Address, and Transmission inputs
Contact form mocked API submission with success message 'Transmission Sent'
External links (GitHub, LinkedIn, Twitter) with hover effects
Enter System and Transmission CTA buttons functionality
Smooth scroll navigation between all sections
Mobile responsive design with proper viewport scaling
CSS-based animated background with grid pattern, light beams, and rotating rings
Mouse parallax effect on background elements
Footer with 'Return to Top' functionality
Space Grotesk font implementation
Zustand store for theme state management
